subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Through the gracious favors of the Lord of Oneness, we eagerly anticipate that souls shall be raised up in that momentous realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بمیثاق از الطاف حضرت احدیت مترصدیم که در آن اقلیم جسیم نفوسی مبعوث
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @call to action
